#  Add a Related Item to a Commitment Change Order 
##  Background 
A _related item_ is a link between two Procore objects. To learn more, see [What are "related items" in Procore?](last%5Frev:31d06ba57952d4b12e9adf18948277f4 "What are "related items" in Procore?")
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add a related item to a change event_ , 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Change Orders tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * For a selection to appear in the 'Type' menu, the corresponding tool must be an active tool on the project. See [Add and Remove Project Tools](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).
    * For a selection to appear in the 'Description' menu, you must be granted the appropriate permission to view that item in the corresponding Procore tool.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the Change Orders Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/enable-the-change-orders-tool)
  * [Create a Commitment Change Order (CCO)](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/materials-user-guide-with-financials/create-a-change-order-cco)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Orders** tool.
  2. Click **View** next to the change order that you want to add the related item to.
  3. Click **Related Items**.
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Complete the following fields:  
![Related Items](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/72f616ac5c157ede62d7eadc9df1d773/2e9dcebbc65ffd96531153a200c4ef12/related-items.png?fm=webp)
     * **Type**. Select the type of item you would like to relate to the change event. (_Note_ : You can only add items that are already in Procore. You can choose from a long list of items like bids, RFIs, productivity log, prime contract change order, or a task.)
     * **Description**. Once you choose a type, the drop-down menu under 'Description' will populate with the items in your project's Procore account that match the type, or you will see an empty field where you can enter your own description.
     * **Date**. The date will automatically populate with the date that the item was created in Procore.
     * **Notes**. Add any notes related to this item.
  6. Click **Add**.
  7. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [What are "related items" in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-related-items-in-procore)
  * [Change Orders - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/permissions)
  * [Approve or Reject Commitment Change Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-commitment-change-orders)
title: Add a Related Item to a Commitment Change Order
description: How to add a related item to a Commitment Change Order (CCO) with the Change Orders tool.
